use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS IN THE PEDIATRIC PATIENT POPULATION WITH 0.25 MG FINGOLIMOD
TREATMENT OF RELAPSING REMITTING MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS BY DETERMINING VARICELLA ZOSTER VIRUS (VZV) STATUS AND VACCINATING PRIOR TO COMMENCING TREATMENT

indications.text:
GILENYA is indicated for the treatment of relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (MS), to include clinically isolated
syndrome, relapsing-remitting disease, and active secondary progressive disease, in patients 10 years of age and older.

GILENYA is indicated for the treatment of relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (MS) in patients 10 years of age and
older.

GILENYA is indicated for the treatment of patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (MS) to reduce the
frequency of clinical exacerbations and to delay the accumulation of physical disability.
